'''Rodisar''' was a sapient<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|nilo|Nilo}}</ref> [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] species from the planet [[Rodis]]<ref name="CE" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Rodis system/Legends|Rodis system]]</ref> Rodisars were a primitive inhabitants and waged [[Winter wars|seasonal wars]] with one another.<ref name="CE" /> [[General/Legends|General]] [[Nilo (Rodisar)|Nilo]] was a member of this species that was kidnapped from his homeplanet by a [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]].<ref name="DB" /> He eventually ended up in the [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiatorial]] [[The Cauldron|arena]] of [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]<ref name="CW" /> around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Nilo the Rodisar<ref name="DB" /> first appeared as an unnamed background character in the [[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|sixth chapter]]<ref name="CW" /> of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', an animated television micro-series<ref name="Chapter Archive">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/archive.html|text=View ''Clone Wars'' Chapter Archive}}</ref> produced by [[Cartoon Network]] Studios<ref name="Volume One">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> and originally aired on [[November 14]], [[2003]].<ref name="TV">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-vi-276612|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 1, Episode 6: Chapter VI}}</ref> The character was later given a name and short backstory in the personal [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry on the official ''[[Star Wars]]'' website, [[StarWars.com]], in [[2011]].<ref name="DB" />

Nilo's appearance was based on unused concept drawings—done by the artist [[Nilo Rodis-Jamero]]—of the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards during the production of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="DB" /> His name Nilo, and his species Rodisar, were an homage to the original artist.<ref name="BDB">{{SW|url=news/back-from-the-drawing-board-recycled-star-wars-aliens|text=Back from the Drawing Board: Recycled ''Star Wars'' Aliens|int=Back from the Drawing Board|nolive=1}}</ref>
